message:
fix: appendFile preserves mode, grep trailing line, inline PATH_SEP

- appendFile now reads existing file mode and passes it to writeFile
  (previously mode reset to default 0o644 on every append)
- grep builtin strips trailing newline before splitting to avoid
  matching empty strings with patterns like .*
- Inline PATH_SEP constant (only used twice, "/" is clearer)
- Simplify normalizePath from 3 regex to 2
- Combine -f/-d cases in builtinTest
